/usr/bin/ar qc libclue.a CMakeFiles/clue.dir/src/core/window.c.o CMakeFiles/clue.dir/src/core/event.c.o CMakeFiles/clue.dir/src/core/focus.c.o CMakeFiles/clue.dir/src/core/widget.c.o CMakeFiles/clue.dir/src/core/backend_select.c.o CMakeFiles/clue.dir/src/renderer/gl_renderer.c.o CMakeFiles/clue.dir/src/renderer/font.c.o CMakeFiles/clue.dir/src/widgets/signal.c.o CMakeFiles/clue.dir/src/widgets/clue_widget.c.o CMakeFiles/clue.dir/src/widgets/draw.c.o CMakeFiles/clue.dir/src/widgets/label.c.o CMakeFiles/clue.dir/src/widgets/button.c.o CMakeFiles/clue.dir/src/widgets/box.c.o CMakeFiles/clue.dir/src/widgets/text_input.c.o CMakeFiles/clue.dir/src/widgets/scroll.c.o CMakeFiles/clue.dir/src/widgets/image.c.o CMakeFiles/clue.dir/src/widgets/checkbox.c.o CMakeFiles/clue.dir/src/widgets/slider.c.o CMakeFiles/clue.dir/src/widgets/dropdown.c.o CMakeFiles/clue.dir/src/widgets/theme.c.o CMakeFiles/clue.dir/src/widgets/grid.c.o CMakeFiles/clue.dir/src/widgets/tabs.c.o CMakeFiles/clue.dir/src/widgets/dialog.c.o CMakeFiles/clue.dir/src/widgets/listview.c.o CMakeFiles/clue.dir/src/widgets/progress.c.o CMakeFiles/clue.dir/src/widgets/tooltip.c.o CMakeFiles/clue.dir/src/widgets/menu.c.o CMakeFiles/clue.dir/src/widgets/treeview.c.o CMakeFiles/clue.dir/src/widgets/table.c.o CMakeFiles/clue.dir/src/widgets/timer.c.o CMakeFiles/clue.dir/src/widgets/app.c.o CMakeFiles/clue.dir/src/third_party/stb_image_impl.c.o CMakeFiles/clue.dir/src/backends/wayland/wayland.c.o "CMakeFiles/clue.dir/generated/xdg-shell-protocol.c.o" CMakeFiles/clue.dir/src/backends/x11/x11.c.o CMakeFiles/clue.dir/src/backends/drm/drm.c.o
/usr/bin/ranlib libclue.a
